notes: Post poll_interval-plumbing baseline (P1). Compare against rtx5090-linux-2026-07-11.json (pyshmem 1.1.0/shmpipeline 1.0.3, 1ms fixed lock-retry interval) to see the effect of forwarding kernel_config.poll_interval into pyshmem.locked_many(). Terminal inter-arrival spacing is reported as latency_ms for compatibility.
